narrative:
Miami Township D (precinct in Clermont County) has 1,027 registered voters, with 55.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 19.7 percentage points.
